purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` 0..1 `Coding`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` 0..1 `Coding`
*  R4B: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.status` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.status` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` do not cover the following types: Coding.
The mappings for `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.productStatus` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: userSelected.
